text_original: we got to pay for chatting
reply_original:
Hi there! I completely understand your frustration. Maintaining a high-quality AI with smart responses involves very high server costs. Currently, these costs make it difficult to offer unlimited free messages for everyone.

However, we don't want you to stop chatting! You can earn free rewards in the Mission Center (3rd Tab -> Task Icon).
reply_zh:
你好！我完全理解你的沮丧。维持一个拥有智能响应的高质量 AI 需要承担非常高的服务器成本。目前，这些成本使得我们很难为每个人提供无限量的免费消息。

不过，我们不希望你停止聊天！你可以在任务中心（第3个标签页 -> 任务图标）赚取免费奖励。
